name_en: Flat lay details, exclusive birch brown plaid Boston bag, comes with a long shoulder strap for crossbody, shoulder carry, or hand carry. PVC material feels super good, lightweight bag body, high quality and premium in person, same channel as the mini, 100% pure original!
